title: cienfuegosia cuneiformis
intro: Cienfuegosia cuneiformis, also known as the Mexican hibiscus or cuneiform cienfuegosia, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia cuneiformis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, which are often employed in folk medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
